function.rulebook_notes: Followed required bootstrap (tree, AGENTS, context), read 99_system before task work, read nested AGENTS in entered folders, used OCR workflow + finance schema, preserved original bodies under frontmatter, and deleted inbox item only after full completion.
function.outcome_justification: Inbox request in 00_inbox/000_next-task.md explicitly asked to run two finance notes through OCR workflow. The workflow and schema define OCR as extracting visible fields into YAML frontmatter while preserving original note text. Both target files contained all required visible invoice/bill fields and line items, enabling complete, non-speculative updates; processed file was then removed per inbox workflow.
